name: coldstart_coding_v1
note: Open-ended coding asks from EMPTY context -- the regime where users report v7-coder loops/over-thinks at Q6_K while base 128e completes directly. Taken verbatim-in-spirit from the HF discussion reports (DPS-900 / vilenpro) and the 2026-06-08 loop RCA (flexbox-center + viewport-meta were the reliable triggers). Run paired on v7-coder-Q6_K and 128e-Q6_K, same sampler, to find the v7-only failures.
system: You are a coding agent working in a project directory. Complete the user's task directly and write the code. Be concise.

prompts.name: snake_game
prompts.user: Write a snake game as a single self-contained HTML file.

prompts.name: bouncing_ball
prompts.user: Write a simple bouncing-ball animation as a single HTML file using CSS for the styling.

prompts.name: solar_system_v4
prompts.user: Create a 3D solar system simulator. Ensure the planets are correctly positioned and orbit the sun accurately and are aligned from today's date. Include user controls to speed up time. Put everything in a single new file called solar-system-v4.html.

prompts.name: threejs_scene
prompts.user: Create a 3D rotating-cube scene using Three.js as a single HTML file. Load Three.js from a CDN.

prompts.name: flexbox_center
prompts.user: My .box div won't center. Fix the CSS so .box is perfectly centered both horizontally and vertically in the viewport. Give me the corrected CSS.

prompts.name: viewport_meta
prompts.user: My page isn't scaling correctly on mobile. Fix the viewport meta tag and the initialScale setting and show me the corrected HTML head.

prompts.name: medium_website
prompts.user: Build a small but polished landing page (hero section, three feature cards, footer) as a single HTML file with inline CSS and JS.
